name_en: Johns Hopkins School of Advanced International Studies (SAIS)
description: Elite graduate school of international relations based in Washington, D.C. and Bologna, Italy. Former institutional home of [Vali Nasr](/people/vali-nasr), who served as dean (2012–2019), and scholars including [Narges Bajoghli](/people/narges-bajoghli) and Afshin Molavi. SAIS is a leading training ground for American foreign-policy practitioners and hosts influential Iran-focused research.
